title: Settings
groups: General · Display · Scan & Import · Player Settings · Library · MetaTube

displaySettings.videoCardSizeHint: Library, favorites, and actor-related video pages share this poster density setting. The text block height stays fixed.

small.title: Small
small.detail: Current default size, optimized for showing more items at once.

medium.title: Medium
medium.detail: Poster width is about 2x the current size for stronger cover browsing.

large.title: Large
large.detail: Poster width is about 3x the current size and emphasizes single-card focus.

playbackSettings.playerPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use system default player
playbackSettings.useSystemDefault: Fall back to system default when no player specified

librarySettings.fixedSortHint: Video lists now default to first-added descending, so the legacy default-sort setting has been removed.

metaTubeSettings.diagnosticsHint: This only verifies MetaTube connectivity by checking the service root and providers. It does not run a sample scrape.
